title: PulseFit: sample landing template
desc: Demonstration landing page. All text is sample (dummy) content.

sections.sub: PulseFit turns your phone into a personal coach, with adaptive workouts and progress you can actually see.
From the first squat to your fastest mile, PulseFit guides every rep and every step.
cards: Plans that adjust to your energy, schedule and goals each day.
Connect any wearable and train in the right zone every session.
Clear charts track strength, pace and consistency over time.
PulseFit fits training around your week, not the other way around.
Join challenges and share milestones with friends who keep you honest.
On-screen cues help you move safely and get more from each rep.

sections.text: Tell PulseFit your goal and the time you have, and it shapes a plan that grows with you week after week.
bullets: Goals for strength, fat loss or endurance
Sessions that flex to your schedule

sections.text: Log sets, runs and rides in a tap. PulseFit remembers your numbers so you always know if you are improving.
bullets: History for every lift and route

sections.sub: No equipment list, no guesswork required.
steps: Pick a focus and tell us how often you can train.
Receive a tailored program ready for day one.
Train, track and watch your progress add up.

sections.quote: PulseFit got me running three times a week without burning out. Seeing my pace drop every month keeps me coming back.
sections.author: Sample Person

sections.sub: Start free. Upgrade when you are ready to go further.

items: No. Most plans work with bodyweight, and PulseFit adapts if you add gear later.
PulseFit syncs with popular watches and chest straps over Bluetooth in seconds.
Is there really a free plan?
Yes. The Free plan stays free forever, with no card required to begin.
You can cancel a paid plan whenever you like and keep access until it ends.
Tell PulseFit your week and it builds sessions around the time you actually have.

sections.sub: Join millions building stronger, healthier habits one session at a time.

sections.tagline: Your adaptive coach for workouts, runs and lasting habits. Sample dummy brand for template preview.
sections.copyright: // PulseFit is a sample template with dummy content
